# Vendored PyDMF

- Upstream repository copy: `temp_repos/dmf`
- Upstream commit: `ed7ed53623e8eaa2e8f57d040b3564a731a67e46`
- License: MIT, preserved in `LICENSE`

ATST-Tools imports this vendored copy through `atst_tools.external.pydmf.dmf`.
It intentionally does not expose a top-level `dmf` package.
